title: More Nonsense Limerick 32
content:
There was a young person in pink,
    Who called out for something to drink;
    But they said, "O my daughter, 
    There's nothing but water!"
    Which vexed that young person in pink.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "More Nonsense Limerick 32", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
